title: Bewitchment REI
description: Adds REI support to Bewitchment for 1.20
body:
Readds support for Roughly enough items to Bewitchment recipes. 
Includes:
- Athame Drops
- Athame Log Stripping Drops
- Cauldron Brewing
- Curse Recipes
- Incense Recipes
- Oil Recipes
- Ritual Recipes

Only available for 1.20, as it had full REI support on earlier versions
